zh.Mashbury, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可馬申波利
zh.Of, Mashbury, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可馬申波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Eugene Everard於1432年出生在英國艾可馬申波利時，他的父親William Everard30歲，母親Isabell Bedall22歲。他於大約1455年與Katherine Darcy結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1465年在英國英格蘭艾可馬申波利享年34歲。

zh-hans.Mashbury, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可馬申波利
zh-hans.Of, Mashbury, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可馬申波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Eugene Everard于1432年出生在英国艾可馬申波利时，他的父亲William Everard30岁，母亲Isabell Bedall22岁。他于大约1455年与Katherine Darcy结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1465年在英国英格兰艾可馬申波利享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Everard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Everett  .
French (northern), Walloon, and Dutch: variant of French and Walloon   Evrard  , Dutch   Everhard  .
Americanized form of German   Eberhardt   or   Everhardt  .

variants.name: Everett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal names Everard and Everet. These might occasionally be from the Old English form of the name, Eoforheard (from eofor ‘boar’ + heard ‘hardy, brave’), but many bearers of this name were undoubtedly Normans, who took it from the cognate ancient Germanic Eburhard, Everhard.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Eugene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French form of the Greek name Eugenios (from eugenēs ‘well-born, noble’). This name was borne by various early saints, notably a 5th-century bishop of Carthage, a 7th-century bishop of Toledo, and four popes. It is sometimes used as an Anglicized form of Irish Eóghan and has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Irish name Aodh.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Eugene Everard was born in 1432, in Mashbury, Essex, England, his father, William Everard, was 30 and his mother, Isabell Bedall, was 22. He married Katherine Darcy about 1455. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1465, in Mashbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Eugene Everard est né en 1432, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre, son père, William Everard, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabell Bedall, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Darcy environ 1455. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1465, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Eugene Everard 1432 in Mashbury, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Everard 30 und seine Mutter Isabell Bedall 22. Er hat um 1455 Katherine Darcy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1465 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Mashbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Eugene Everard è nato il nel 1432 nel Mashbury, Essex, England, il suo padre, William Everard, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Isabell Bedall, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Darcy circa 1455. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1465, nel Mashbury, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Eugene Everardが1432年にイギリスエセックスマシュブリーで生まれた時，父William Everardは30歳，母Isabell Bedallは22歳であった。約1455年にKatherine Darcyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1465年にイギリスイギリスエセックスマシュブリーで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Eugene Everard(이)가 1432년 영국 에세스 마스h버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Everard(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell Bedall(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1455년 Katherine Darcy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 마스h버이에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Eugene Everard nasceu em 1432, em Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Everard, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Bedall, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Darcy aproximadamente 1455. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1465, em Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Eugene Everard родился в 1432 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Everard было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Bedall, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Darcy около 1455 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1465 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Eugene Everard nació en 1432, en Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, William Everard, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Isabell Bedall, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Katherine Darcy aproximadamente 1455. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1465, en Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 34 años.
